cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the passage and the options step by step. The question asks us to infer something from the passage. The passage says that William G. Morgan created the game "mintonette" which later became volleyball. So option A says volleyball develops from "mintonette". That seems correct based on the text. Option B claims most competitive teams are in college, but the passage only mentions that there are many types including high school, college, etc., without specifying which is the most common. Option C suggests the rules changed because they were easy to learn, but the passage says the rules continued to change until the game became what it is today.
